name: Invictus Energy Limited
description: Invictus Energy Limited is an independent upstream oil and gas company focused on energy resources in sub-Saharan Africa. The company is primarily engaged in the exploration and appraisal of the Cabora Bassa project in northern Zimbabwe, where it holds an 80% interest in a 360,000-hectare licence area. Following significant gas-condensate discoveries at the Mukuyu Gas Field, the company is currently advancing commercialisation opportunities, field appraisal activities, and further exploration drilling to develop its resource base and become a key energy supplier in the region.
